title: Google entered the "AGENTIC ERA"
summary: Wes Roth reviews Google's entry into what he frames as the "agentic era" with Gemini 3.5 and discusses broader implications including AI search, Android XR glasses, and AI-powered email and document features. The video covers Google's competitive positioning against OpenAI in the race toward autonomous AI agents.
